segments.text: If a run-up f-smash would have done it, but Miya, I think, just kind of believe I don't need to do that.
I'm already in position to kill with f-smash.

full_text: If a run-up f-smash would have done it, but Miya, I think, just kind of believe I don't need to do that. I'm already in position to kill with f-smash.
